CustomField.formula: IF( CONTAINS(Survey__r.Name, "לניתוח") ,"https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/ft191aa88a1574070898267_copy?fld48="& formtitan_id_2__c, IF (CONTAINS(Survey__r.Name, "cpap"), "https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/ftproject/cpap_survey?sid="& formtitan_id_2__c, IF($User.Ashdod_employee__c,"https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/ft95bc0dcb1594544259490_copy?fld47="& formtitan_id_2__c , "https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/patient_survey?fld47="& formtitan_id_2__c )))
CustomField.label: קישור לסקר
